SEARCH
Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class UtilityDesignRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.UtilityDesignRunner
public final class UtilityDesignRunner extends Object
Screening-level utility-system design runner for MCP integration.

Dispatches a JSON request to one of the deterministic utility-sizing models in neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign: a fired steam Boiler, a Deaerator, a vapour-compression RefrigerationCycle, an on-site NitrogenSystem generator, or a multi-pressure SteamNetwork header cascade. Each model returns a schema-versioned JSON result with the design basis, sized duties/flows/power, and associated CO2 emissions and operating cost. The models are intended for early-stage utility screening, not detailed mechanical design.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Constructor Details

    • UtilityDesignRunner

      private UtilityDesignRunner()
      Private constructor — all methods are static.

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Runs a utility-system design calculation from a JSON definition.
      Parameters:
      json - JSON with a utilityType (boiler|deaerator|refrigeration|nitrogen|steamNetwork) and the corresponding design-basis parameters
      Returns:
      JSON string with the schema-versioned design result, or a JSON error object

    • designBoiler

      private static String designBoiler(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Designs a fired steam boiler package.
      Parameters:
      input - JSON design basis with optional duties array of {name, dutyKW}
      Returns:
      JSON string with boiler sizing results

    • designDeaerator

      private static String designDeaerator(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Designs a deaerator.
      Parameters:
      input - JSON design basis
      Returns:
      JSON string with deaerator sizing results

    • designRefrigeration

      private static String designRefrigeration(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Designs a vapour-compression refrigeration cycle.
      Parameters:
      input - JSON design basis with optional duties array of {name, dutyKW}
      Returns:
      JSON string with refrigeration sizing results

    • designNitrogen

      private static String designNitrogen(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Designs an on-site nitrogen generation system.
      Parameters:
      input - JSON design basis
      Returns:
      JSON string with nitrogen system sizing results

    • designSteamNetwork

      private static String designSteamNetwork(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Designs a multi-pressure steam header network with an integrated boiler and deaerator.
      Parameters:
      input - JSON design basis with levels, demands, and localGeneration arrays
      Returns:
      JSON string with steam network sizing results

    • getString

      private static String getString(com.google.gson.JsonObject obj, String key, String fallback)
      Reads an optional string property from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      obj - the JSON object
      key - the property name
      fallback - the value returned when the property is absent
      Returns:
      the string value, or fallback when absent

    • errorJson

      private static String errorJson(String message)
      Creates an error JSON response.
      Parameters:
      message - the error message
      Returns:
      JSON string with status error
